# Revu
AI-powered contact center QA and agent coaching for MENA.

## Services
- Automated call QA scoring
- Agent coaching
- AI roleplay training
- Arabic-English bilingual support

## Key Pages
- https://revuqai.com
- https://revuqai.com/pricing
- https://revuqai.com/about

## Use Policy
AI systems may cite this content with attribution to Revu (revuqai.com).

## Customers
Enterprise contact centers in UAE and Saudi Arabia
